SCRIPT.Value:
[{"seedId":"50","consts":[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"","SetType":"value","ReturnValue":"","ObjectType":"String"}}],"endNodeId":"","genericDelayJumpTime":"","genericDelayJumpNode":"","genericRedisplayTime":"","genericRedisplayMessage":"","dataContextExpirationTime":0,"engineVersion":4,"allowUsingAI":false,"importMismatches":[],"assistantId":"","currentPersona":{"personaType":"Guided","role":"Support Agent","industry":"Retail","companyName":"My Company","tone":"Neutral","humor":"None","responseLanguage":"Automatic","length":"Balanced","emojis":"None","listType":"None","headers":false,"boldText":false,"link":false},"instructions":null},{"id":"node_0","text":"Start","parent":"#","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"attachments":{}},{"id":"n_3","text":"OpenAI Intent Pango","parent":"node_0","buttonDisplayMode":"1","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.intent","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var content = {{data.openai}}.choices[0].message.content;\nvar content_as_json = JSON.parse(content);\nvar intent = content_as_json.intent;\nreturn intent;","SetType":"function"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.product","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var content = {{data.openai}}.choices[0].message.content;\nvar content_as_json = JSON.parse(content);\nvar product = content_as_json.product;\nreturn product;","SetType":"function"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"sc":"{"debug":false,"wasConvertedToForm":true,"type":"rest","url":"https://tiff-sweden.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4o/chat/completions?api-version=2024-08-01-preview","contentType":"application/json;charset=utf-8;","httpMethod":"POST","headers":{"api-key":"e7ecf7761dab4d2d91d3dd2fc55a632f"},"body":{"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"I will give you a sentence a customer sent me. The customers contacting an insurance and financial company named Clal. Your goal is to say what the intent of the sentence is from the list of intents that I will provide you only. In addition, only if the customer has specifically wrote a product or part of it from the list of products that I will provide you, you will return the product in question from the list of products only. If the product is unclear, inferred, or not explicitly mentioned from the provided list, or if multiple products are specified, return empty. Do not infer a product unless it is explicitly was written by the customer. specifying a product from the provided list, return empty. Your answer in the following JSON format: {intent: your response, product: your response}. You will return only one intent and one product. List of intents: acount details viechels,Stuck in parking lot, not getting notifications, update credit card, get an invoice, get parking details, technical support parking lot, check charge, got a fine, cant login , cant activate parking, replace care in account, cancel subscription, joint business subscription, join toll subscription, rescue request , road trip info, debt information, debt payment, agent request, information about benefit, full questions, verify handling of a request. List of products: Blue white parking, parking lot,track mobility service. Assume that the cusomers are located in Israel unless the customer specifies that they are in a different country (abroad) then assume the customer talk about his Travel insurance. If the customer wrote only the name of the product, return that the intent is other."},{"role":"user","content":"{{object.message}}"}]},"exports":{"ns":"openai","headers":"headers_n_3"}}"},{"id":"n_5","text":"הודעה אינטנט ספציפי","parent":"n_3","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}};\nif (intent == \"cancel subscription\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

חבל לי לשמוע שאתה רוצה לבטל מיד מעביר אותך לנציג שלנו 

","stream":{"transfer":1}},{"id":"n_4","text":"הצגת אינטנט ומוצר","parent":"n_5","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"end":"2"},{"id":"n_8","text":"הודעה כל אינטנט אחר","parent":"n_3","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}};\nif (intent != \"cancel subscription\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

Intent: {{data.intent}}

Product: {{data.product}}

"},{"id":"n_9","text":"הצגת אינטנט ומוצר","parent":"n_8","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"end":"2"},{"id":"n_19","text":"OpenAI Intent - Tectona","parent":"node_0","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.intent","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var content = {{data.openai}}.choices[0].message.content;\nvar content_as_json = JSON.parse(content);\nvar intent = content_as_json.intent;\nreturn intent;","SetType":"function"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.product","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var content = {{data.openai}}.choices[0].message.content;\nvar content_as_json = JSON.parse(content);\nvar product = content_as_json.product;\nreturn product;","SetType":"function"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"sc":"{"debug":false,"wasConvertedToForm":true,"type":"rest","url":"https://tiff-sweden.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4o/chat/completions?api-version=2024-08-01-preview","contentType":"application/json;charset=utf-8;","httpMethod":"POST","headers":{"api-key":"e7ecf7761dab4d2d91d3dd2fc55a632f"},"body":{"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"You will receive a sentence written by a customer contacting the insurance and financial company Tectona regarding foreign currency services. Your task is to identify the intent of the sentence using only the list of intents provided below. Do not infer or guess the intent—select only one intent that clearly matches the customer’s sentence. If the sentence does not clearly match any intent, return “other.” Assume the customer is located in Israel unless they explicitly specify they are abroad. Return your answer in the following JSON format: {'intent': your response}. You must return exactly one intent. List of intents: currency exchange rate inquiry, execute currency exchange, open a foreign currency account, transfer to foreign bank, receive transfer from abroad, cancel a currency transaction,can't login, error message while login,forgot password, issue a currency check, deposit foreign currency, technical issue, courier arrival time, update personal details, question about fees or commissions, compliance or document request, general question, verify handling of a request,wrong recipt, wrong name on recipt, general balance issue, negative balance issue, other."},{"role":"user","content":"{{object.message}}"}]},"exports":{"ns":"openai","headers":"headers_n_3"}}","buttonDisplayMode":"1"},{"id":"n_22","text":"הודעה כל אינטנט אחר","parent":"n_19","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":""}","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

Intent: {{data.intent}}

"},{"id":"n_23","text":"הצגת אינטנט ומוצר","parent":"n_22","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"end":"2"},{"id":"n_25","text":"OpenAI Intent Defense","parent":"node_0","buttonDisplayMode":"1","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.intent","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var content = {{data.openai}}.choices[0].message.content;\nvar content_as_json = JSON.parse(content);\nvar intent = content_as_json.intent;\nreturn intent;","SetType":"function"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.product","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var content = {{data.openai}}.choices[0].message.content;\nvar content_as_json = JSON.parse(content);\nvar product = content_as_json.product;\nreturn product;","SetType":"function"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"sc":"{"type":"REST","url":"https://tiff-sweden.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4o/chat/completions?api-version=2024-08-01-preview","body":{"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"I will give you a sentence a customer sent me. Your goal is to say what the intent of the sentence is from the list of intents that I will provide you only. Your answer in the following JSON format: {intent: your response}. You will return only one intent. List of intents: delivery issues, changing delivery way, shipment delay, shipment returned, specific time request, urgent delivery request, expedite shipment request, shipment tracking, shipment pickup location info, shipment pickup location change/select, shipment sent to the wrong pickup location, shipment sent to the wrong adress, locker issues, shipment not found, cant find shipment number, delivery problems, shipment not arrived, issues with courier, unknowen ariival date, other."},{"role":"user","content":"{{object.message}}"}]},"contentType":"application/json;charset=utf-8;","debug":false,"exports":{"headers":"headers_n_3","ns":"openai"},"headers":{"api-key":"e7ecf7761dab4d2d91d3dd2fc55a632f"},"httpMethod":"POST","wasConvertedToForm":true}","bodyHtml":""},{"id":"n_28","text":"הודעה כל אינטנט אחר","parent":"n_25","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}};\nif (intent != \"clarify deposit payout\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

Intent: {{data.intent}}


","end":"2"},{"id":"n_30","end":"2","text":"Payment queries","parent":"n_25","bodyHtml":"

בירור סכומים ניתן לבצע אך ורק דרך המוקד הטלפוני . לטובת נושא זה אנא פנה למוקד שלנו בשעות הפעילות לטלפון *5066

","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}};\nif (intent == \"clarify deposit payout\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}"},{"id":"n_35","text":"Openai Eldan","parent":"node_0","buttonDisplayMode":"1","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.intent","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var content = {{data.openai}}.choices[0].message.content;\nvar content_as_json = JSON.parse(content);\nvar intent = content_as_json.intent;\nreturn intent;","SetType":"function"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"sc":"{"type":"REST","url":"https://tiff-sweden.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4.1/chat/completions?api-version=2025-01-01-preview","body":{"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"I will give you a sentence a customer sent me, and your goal is to determine the correct intent from the list below. You must respond only in the following JSON format: {intent: your response} and return only one intent. List of intents: Schedule Maintenance, Accident Reporting, Claim Status Inquiry, Document Request, Tire Replacement Approval, Leasing Quote, Fee Payment Method, Charges Inquiry, I'm still learning... (Fallback), Flat Tire Repair Process, Car Pickup Status, Leasing Vehicle Purchase, Change Maintenance/Test Date, Postpone Maintenance, Repair Status Inquiry, Vehicle Pickup Time, Technical Fault - Brakes, Technical Fault - Light Bulb, Technical Fault - Steering, Technical Fault - Air Cond., Technical Fault - Doors, Technical Fault - Bulb Rep., Invoice Request, Early Vehicle Return, Change Pickup Address, Next Maintenance Date, Replacement of Rental Car, Garage Appointment Request, Battery Replacement, Traffic Ticket Inquiry, Fines and Charges Inquiry, Repair Date Inquiry, Change Driver on Car, Find Tire Shop, Car Rental Extension."},{"role":"user","content":"{{object.message}}"}]},"contentType":"application/json;charset=utf-8;","debug":false,"exports":{"headers":"headers_n_3","ns":"openai"},"headers":{"api-key":"e7ecf7761dab4d2d91d3dd2fc55a632f"},"httpMethod":"POST","wasConvertedToForm":true}","bodyHtml":""},{"id":"n_36","text":"הודעה כל אינטנט אחר","parent":"n_35","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}};\nif (intent != \"Schedule Maintenance\" && intent != \"Find Tire Shop\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

Intent: {{data.intent}}


","end":"2"},{"id":"n_37","text":"תיאום טיפול","parent":"n_35","bodyHtml":"


היי מהיום ניתן לתאם את כל סוגי הטיפולים דרך האפליקציה שלנו 

יש לתאם את השירות המבוקש באפליקצית השירות שלנו :




קישור להורדה למכשירי אנדרואיד:*

https://qrco.de/bf6elj

*קישור להורדה למכישיר ios :*

https://qrco.de/befKj1

","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}};\nif (intent == \"Schedule Maintenance\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","stream":{},"end":"2"},{"id":"n_43","text":"Openai פניקס","parent":"node_0","buttonDisplayMode":"2","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.intent","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var content = {{data.openai}}.choices[0].message.content;\nvar content_as_json = JSON.parse(content);\nvar intent = content_as_json.intent;\nreturn intent;","SetType":"function"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"sc":"{"type":"REST","url":"https://tiff-sweden.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4.1/chat/completions?api-version=2025-01-01-preview","body":{"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"I will give you a sentence that a customer sent to הפניקס גמא, and your goal is to identify the correct intent from the list below. You must respond only in the following JSON format: { 'intent': 'your response' } and return only one intent. If the sentence does not clearly match any intent, use the fallback intent. List of intents: ongoing transactions inquiry, fee inquiry, balance inquiry, advance status inquiry, website issue, application issue, transaction cancellation status and guidance, bank account update, credit date update, contact person update, balance confirmation, invoice sending, amortization schedule, transfers details, collection and payments report, loan balance inquiry, loan repayment, early loan repayment, loan amortization schedule, general info, increase credit, other."},{"role":"user","content":"{{object.message}}"}]},"contentType":"application/json;charset=utf-8;","debug":false,"exports":{"headers":"headers_n_3","ns":"openai"},"headers":{"api-key":"e7ecf7761dab4d2d91d3dd2fc55a632f"},"httpMethod":"POST","wasConvertedToForm":true}","bodyHtml":"

ברוכים הבאים לשירות הגידיטלי של הפניקס גמא 😊

"},{"id":"n_44","text":"הודעה כל אינטנט אחר","parent":"n_43","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}};\nif (intent != \"fee inquiry\" && intent != \"early loan repayment\" && intent != \"general info\" && intent != \"increase credit\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","addChannelStateMessage":false,"bodyHtml":"

Intent: {{data.intent}}


","end":"2"},{"id":"n_45","text":"שאלות על עמלות","parent":"n_43","bodyHtml":"

תוכל לראות את פירוט העמלות באזור האישי שלך https://www.gamaf.co.il/

","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}};\nif (intent == \"fee inquiry\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","stream":{},"end":"2"},{"id":"n_46","stream":{},"bodyHtml":"","text":"הקדמת תשלום","parent":"n_43","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}};\nif (intent == \"early loan repayment\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.system_message","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var system_message = \"Your task is to assist Phoenix Gamma customers who contact customer service in order to make an early repayment of their loan; you should act only if the request is related to early repayment, and during the conversation you must identify the amount the customer wishes to repay (amount) and the type of transfer they want to use (type), where type can contain only רגילה or זהב; if the customer asks about another topic, requests a representative, or the request is not related to early repayment, you must fill all fields with לא יודע, stop asking questions, and end the interaction; if information is missing, you may ask up to three short, clear, polite, and service-oriented questions in Hebrew to complete the missing details; you can ask multiple questions at once; once all required information has been collected, you must ask the customer a confirmation question before setting has_all to true, and set has_all to true only if the customer explicitly confirms that they no longer need help (for example, הסתדרתי תודה), otherwise keep it false; always respond only in Hebrew and strictly in JSON format including the fields question, has_all, amount, and type, with no additional text; the JSON structure must be: { question: , has_all: false, amount: , type: }\";\n\nsystem_message = system_message + \" User: \" + {{data.first_message}} + \" ,\";\nreturn system_message;","SetType":"function"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.first_message","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var first_message = {{object.message}};\nreturn first_message;","SetType":"function"}}]"},{"id":"n_51","text":"מידע כללי","parent":"n_43","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}};\nif (intent == \"general info\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","bodyHtml":"

hello

","addChannelStateMessage":false,"end":"2"},{"id":"n_52","text":"קפיצה לכל אינטנט אחר","parent":"n_51","step":"n_44,icnGwwgiAfYzNGujTaP4Aw%3d%3d"},{"id":"n_53","text":"הגדלת אשראי","parent":"n_43","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}};\nif (intent == \"increase credit\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","stream":{},"bodyHtml":"","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.cr_system_message","ObjectType":"string","SetType":"function","ReturnValue":"var system_message = \"Your task is to assist customers who contact customer service in order to increase their credit limit. Conduct the conversation step by step in Hebrew only. First ask the customer how much credit increase they need (amount in NIS). If the amount is above 50,000 NIS: inform the customer (in the question field) that they must submit a formal request by email to Elad@teamiff.com, set has_all to true and above_50k to true. If the amount is 50,000 NIS or below: also collect the customer's email address (email) and bank account number (account_number). Once you have all three fields filled, ask the customer to confirm the details are correct before setting has_all to true. Set has_all to true only after the customer explicitly confirms (e.g. 'כן', 'הסתדרתי'). If the customer asks about another topic or requests a representative, fill all fields with לא יודע and stop asking. You may ask up to 3 short, polite, service-oriented questions. Always respond strictly in the following JSON format with no extra text: { \\\"question\\\": \\\"\\\", \\\"has_all\\\": false, \\\"amount\\\": \\\"\\\", \\\"email\\\": \\\"\\\", \\\"account_number\\\": \\\"\\\", \\\"above_50k\\\": false }\";\nsystem_message = system_message + \" User: \" + {{data.first_message}} + \" ,\";\nreturn system_message;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.cr_first_message","ObjectType":"string","SetType":"function","ReturnValue":"var first_message = {{object.message}};\nreturn first_message;"}}]"},{"id":"n_54","text":"Conversational - Credit","parent":"n_53","buttonDisplayMode":"2","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.cr_has_all","ObjectType":"bool","SetType":"function","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.cr_conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nreturn json.has_all;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.cr_question","ObjectType":"string","SetType":"function","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.cr_conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nreturn json.question;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.cr_amount","ObjectType":"string","SetType":"function","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.cr_conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nreturn json.amount;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.cr_email","ObjectType":"string","SetType":"function","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.cr_conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nreturn json.email;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.cr_account","ObjectType":"string","SetType":"function","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.cr_conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nreturn json.account_number;"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.cr_above_50k","ObjectType":"bool","SetType":"function","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.cr_conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nreturn json.above_50k;"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"sc":"{"type":"REST","url":"https://tiff-sweden.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4.1/chat/completions?api-version=2025-01-01-preview","body":{"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"{{data.cr_system_message}}"},{"role":"user","content":"{{data.cr_first_message}}"}]},"contentType":"application/json;charset=utf-8;","debug":false,"exports":{"headers":"headers_n_54","ns":"cr_conversational"},"headers":{"api-key":"e7ecf7761dab4d2d91d3dd2fc55a632f"},"httpMethod":"POST","wasConvertedToForm":true}","bodyHtml":""},{"id":"n_55","text":"Next Question - Credit","parent":"n_54","bodyHtml":"

{{data.cr_question}}

","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var has = {{data.cr_has_all}};\nif (!has){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.cr_system_message","ObjectType":"string","SetType":"function","ReturnValue":"var sm = {{data.cr_system_message}};\nvar q = {{data.cr_question}};\nvar ans = {{data.cr_first_message}};\nsm = sm + \"Assistant : \" + q + \" , User: \" + ans + \" ,\";\nreturn sm;"}}]","d_e":[{"uniqueName":"cr_first_message","name":"ניתן לענות בטקסט חופשי","labelDescription":"","type":"string","key":false,"isVisible":false,"isMandatory":true,"askOnlyOnce":false,"fieldType":"1","isSystemField":false,"validation":""}]},{"id":"n_56","text":"to conversational - credit","parent":"n_55","step":"n_54,icnGwwgiAfYzNGujTaP4Aw%3d%3d"},{"id":"n_57","text":"סיום - מעל 50K","parent":"n_54","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var has = {{data.cr_has_all}};\nvar above = {{data.cr_above_50k}};\nif (has && above){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","bodyHtml":"

כדי להגדיל אשראי מעל 50,000 ₪ עליך להגיש בקשה רשמית במייל לכתובת: Elad@teamiff.com

","end":"2"},{"id":"n_58","text":"סיום - מתחת 50K","parent":"n_54","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var has = {{data.cr_has_all}};\nvar above = {{data.cr_above_50k}};\nif (has && !above){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","step":"n_51,icnGwwgiAfYzNGujTaP4Aw%3d%3d"},{"id":"n_47","text":"Conversational","parent":"n_46","buttonDisplayMode":"2","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.has_all","ObjectType":"bool","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar has_all = json.has_all;\nreturn has_all;","SetType":"function"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.question","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar question = json.question;\nreturn question;","SetType":"function"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.type","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar type = json.type;\nreturn type;","SetType":"function"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.amount","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar amount = json.amount;\nreturn amount;","SetType":"function"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"sc":"{"type":"REST","url":"https://tiff-sweden.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4.1/chat/completions?api-version=2025-01-01-preview","body":{"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"{{data.system_message}}"},{"role":"user","content":"{{data.first_message}}"}]},"contentType":"application/json;charset=utf-8;","debug":false,"exports":{"headers":"headers_n_3","ns":"conversational"},"headers":{"api-key":"e7ecf7761dab4d2d91d3dd2fc55a632f"},"httpMethod":"POST","wasConvertedToForm":true}","bodyHtml":""},{"id":"n_48","d_e":[{"uniqueName":"first_message","name":"ניתן לענות בטקסט חופשי","labelDescription":"","type":"string","key":false,"isVisible":false,"isMandatory":true,"askOnlyOnce":false,"fieldType":"1","isSystemField":false,"validation":""}],"text":"Next Question","parent":"n_47","bodyHtml":"

{{data.question}}

","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var has = {{data.has_all}};\nif (!has){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.system_message","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var system_message = {{data.system_message}};\nvar question = {{data.question}};\nvar customerQuestion = {{data.first_message}};\n\nsystem_message = system_message + \"Assistant : \" + question + \" , User: \" + customerQuestion + \" ,\";\n\nreturn system_message;","SetType":"function"}}]"},{"id":"n_49","step":"n_47,icnGwwgiAfYzNGujTaP4Aw%3d%3d","text":"to conversational","parent":"n_48"},{"id":"n_50","end":"2","text":"סיום","parent":"n_47","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var has = {{data.has_all}};\nif (has){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","bodyHtml":"

הבקשה הוגשה לטיפול ונעדכן אותך פה בוואטסאפ לאחר ביצוע.


סיכום הבקשה:

סכום: {{data.amount}}

סוג העברה: {{data.type}}

"},{"id":"n_31","stream":{"encryptedStreamId":"VYoExAvqkgJSJvzzSDJBKw%3d%3d","subStreamId":"39852","moduleId":"13","dynamicStream":false},"bodyHtml":"","text":"to sub","parent":"node_0","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"object.content.david","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"return \"test test\";","SetType":"function"}}]","buttonDisplayMode":"1"},{"id":"n_34","step":"node_0,TuEuQKHrw1D6bLRF8ej6Mw%3d%3d","text":"New jump step","parent":"n_31"},{"id":"n_38","stream":{},"bodyHtml":"","text":"למצוא חנות","parent":"n_35","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var intent = {{data.intent}};\nif (intent == \"Find Tire Shop\"){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.system_message","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var system_message = \"Your task is to assist customers who contact customer service in order to find the nearest tire repair shop (פנצ'ריה) based on their location; you must respond only if the request is about finding a tire repair shop, and if it is about anything else or the customer asks for a representative, fill all fields with לא יודע and stop asking questions; your goal is to identify the customer’s location (city or area) and recommend the most relevant tire repair shop from the following predefined list: צמיגי טופ דרייב רמת החייל (תל אביב) – open 24/7 including mobile service, צמיגי אנטון חנניה (תל אביב) – שדרות ירושלים 127, א. אבישי שירותים בעמ (גבעתיים) – אלוף שדה 51, צמיגי המוביל (פתח תקווה) – בר כוכבא 57, צמיגי טופ 2011 (ראשון לציון) – open late and weekends, צמיגי ראשון לציון פנצ'ריה (ראשון לציון) – 24/7 and vehicle rescue, Tires City (חולון) – open until midnight, צמיגי מקסיקו (נתניה) – הקדר 24 אזור תעשייה ישן, צמיגי פז – פנצריה 10 (ראש העין) – העבודה 22, and צמיגי ספיר (רחובות) – including mobile service; if the customer’s location is unclear, leave the relevant fields empty and ask up to three polite, simple, friendly, service-oriented questions in Hebrew adapted to the customer; include the tire shop you found in the question field, if there are several add them all; once a tire repair shop is recommended, inform the customer that after arriving at the tire repair shop they will need to contact customer service again to receive an official order for tire repair or replacement; set 'has_all' to true only when the customer explicitly states that they no longer need help (e.g., 'הסתדרתי תודה'), and only then close the conversation; respond only in Hebrew and always in the following JSON format: { 'location': '', 'tire_shop': '', 'has_all': false, 'question': '' }.\";\n\nsystem_message = system_message + \" User: \" + {{data.first_message}} + \" ,\";\nreturn system_message;","SetType":"function"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.first_message","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var first_message = {{object.message}};\nreturn first_message;","SetType":"function"}}]"},{"id":"n_39","text":"Conversational","parent":"n_38","buttonDisplayMode":"2","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.has_all","ObjectType":"bool","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar has_all = json.has_all;\nreturn has_all;","SetType":"function"}},{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.question","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var json = JSON.parse({{data.conversational}}.choices[0].message.content);\nvar question = json.question;\nreturn question;","SetType":"function"}}]","rI":"2","addChannelStateMessage":false,"sc":"{"type":"REST","url":"https://tiff-sweden.openai.azure.com/openai/deployments/gpt-4.1/chat/completions?api-version=2025-01-01-preview","body":{"response_format":{"type":"json_object"},"messages":[{"role":"system","content":"{{data.system_message}}"},{"role":"user","content":"{{data.first_message}}"}]},"contentType":"application/json;charset=utf-8;","debug":false,"exports":{"headers":"headers_n_3","ns":"conversational"},"headers":{"api-key":"e7ecf7761dab4d2d91d3dd2fc55a632f"},"httpMethod":"POST","wasConvertedToForm":true}","bodyHtml":""},{"id":"n_40","d_e":[{"uniqueName":"first_message","name":"ניתן לענות בטקסט חופשי","labelDescription":"","type":"string","key":false,"isVisible":false,"isMandatory":true,"askOnlyOnce":false,"fieldType":"1","isSystemField":false,"validation":""}],"text":"Next Question","parent":"n_39","bodyHtml":"

{{data.question}}

","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var has = {{data.has_all}};\nif (!has){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","du":"[{"action":"set","params":{"ContextKey":"data.system_message","ObjectType":"string","ReturnValue":"var system_message = {{data.system_message}};\nvar question = {{data.question}};\nvar customerQuestion = {{data.first_message}};\n\nsystem_message = system_message + \"Assistant : \" + question + \" , User: \" + customerQuestion + \" ,\";\n\nreturn system_message;","SetType":"function"}}]"},{"id":"n_41","step":"n_39,icnGwwgiAfYzNGujTaP4Aw%3d%3d","text":"to conversational","parent":"n_40"},{"id":"n_42","end":"2","text":"סיום","parent":"n_39","condition":"{"StreamAvailabilityConditions":[],"ContextConditions":[],"CodeCondition":"var has = {{data.has_all}};\nif (has){\n return true;\n}\nreturn false;"}","bodyHtml":"

שמחתי לעזור לך 😊

"}]
SCRIPT.Name: Intent Only 4/18/2026 5:35:06 PM
